reasoning: Lê Quang Liêm's FIDE rating on the Wikipedia page as of 2025-03-30 is 2739. To achieve a 1% increase, his rating would need to reach 2766.39 (2767). At the recent 2025 Prague Chess Festival which concluded in early March, he drew most of his games and suffered a loss to Sam Shankland, which will drop his official April 2025 rating to roughly 2732. Because the April 2025 FIDE rating list will govern the Wikipedia page for both April resolution dates and likely the June date, it is virtually impossible for him to hit 2767 in that timeframe. For the later dates (September 2025 and March 2026), he would need to gain roughly 35 points from his current live trajectory. Given his age (34), sparse playing schedule (typically only Biel and World Cup in the summer), and his career-peak rating being only 2741, achieving a jump to the mid-2760s is highly improbable. Probabilities are set to the floor for the immediate term with a slight bump for the long-term horizon.
